title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Cushman & Wakefield India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Cushman & Wakefield India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
